name: Blackstone Inc.
summary: Blackstone Inc. is a global alternative asset management firm. The company manages investment funds and vehicles across multiple segments including private equity, real estate, hedge fund solutions, and credit and insurance. Blackstone raises and invests capital on behalf of institutional and individual investors, generating management fees and performance-based revenues from its diversified alternative investment strategies.

products.name: Private Equity Funds
products.description: Investment funds focused on private equity strategies for institutional and individual investors.

products.name: Real Estate Funds
products.description: Investment vehicles targeting real estate assets across various geographies and sectors.

products.name: Hedge Fund Solutions
products.description: Multi-manager hedge fund strategies and solutions for investors.

products.name: Credit and Insurance
products.description: Credit-focused investment strategies and insurance-related asset management solutions.
